inputs.label: Part Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: Surface area of a single part that will receive the coating.

inputs.label: Coating Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the applied coating material.

inputs.label: Coating Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the coating material (e.g., 2700 kg/m³ for aluminum).

inputs.label: Number of Parts
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical parts to be coated.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of additional coating material lost through overspray, drips, etc.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for safety margin to account for process variations.
